definitions: A device that measures magnetic fields.

examples.text: One day in 2015, the magnetometer picked up metal that turned out to be an iron cannon; when the divers blew the sand away, they also discovered a more precious bronze cannon with markings indicating French royalty...
examples.explanation: magnetometer 在句中指“磁力计”，是一种用来测量磁场、探测金属信号的设备。句子里说它探测到了金属，后来证明那是一门铁炮。

reviewSessions.example_text: One day in 2015, the magnetometer (磁力计) picked up metal that turned out to be an iron cannon; when the divers blew the sand away, they also discovered a more precious bronze cannon with markings indicating French royalty...
expected_definitions: A device that measures magnetic fields.
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案准确，表达了“测量磁场的仪器”这一核心意思。
matched_points: 整体含义与“测量磁场的设备/磁力计”一致
